reason: Owner-facing templates and visitor gameplay cards must follow component, accessibility, and mobile UI conventions
Gameplay manager keeps template drafts and server state local without new state dependencies
GameplayDefinition payloads are dynamic JS objects and must remain schema-aligned
Frontend gameplay UI must preserve owner-authored boundaries and run build/test verification
Visitor short-drama gameplay is mobile-first and must not push owner/create flows into the mobile first screen
GameplayDefinition schema and no combat/ranking/privacy constraints are canonical
Short-drama templates should reuse existing GameplayDefinition and template patterns instead of duplicating flows
MVP must avoid platform auto-publication, ad revive, ranking, combat, levels, equipment, and token monetization
